languages.original_text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."

languages.text: "Я высказался достаточно просто, чтобы ты смог{mf||ла} понять суть моего вопроса. Возможно, я должен говорить медленнее".

traits.locale_text: "Я высказался достаточно просто, чтобы ты смог{mf||ла} понять суть моего вопроса. Возможно, я должен говорить медленнее".

languages.text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."
languages.original_text: "Я высказался достаточно просто, чтобы ты смог{mf||ла} понять суть моего вопроса. Возможно, я должен говорить медленнее".

traits.locale_text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."
"I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."
"I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."

languages.text: “我已经说得够清楚了，你理应能理解我问题的本质。也许我该说得再慢一点。”
languages.original_text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."

traits.locale_text: “我已经说得够清楚了，你理应能理解我问题的本质。也许我该说得再慢一点。”

languages.text: «He utilizado términos lo bastante simples como para que entiendas lo que estoy preguntando. Tal vez deba hablar más despacio».
languages.original_text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."

traits.locale_text: «He utilizado términos lo bastante simples como para que entiendas lo que estoy preguntando. Tal vez deba hablar más despacio».

languages.text: « Mes propos étaient assez rudimentaires pour que vous puissiez saisir le sens de ma question. Je devrais peut-être parler plus lentement. »
languages.original_text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."

traits.locale_text: « Mes propos étaient assez rudimentaires pour que vous puissiez saisir le sens de ma question. Je devrais peut-être parler plus lentement. »

languages.text: "Sorumun özünü anlayabileceğin kadar açık konuştum. Belki de daha yavaş konuşmalıyım."
languages.original_text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."

traits.locale_text: "Sorumun özünü anlayabileceğin kadar açık konuştum. Belki de daha yavaş konuşmalıyım."

languages.text: "Ich habe bewusst deutlich gesprochen, damit du die Essenz meiner Frage verstehst. Vielleicht sollte ich langsamer sprechen."
languages.original_text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe bewusst deutlich gesprochen, damit du die Essenz meiner Frage verstehst. Vielleicht sollte ich langsamer sprechen."

languages.text: 「私の問いの本質を理解できるよう、十分に分かりやすく語ったつもりだ。もっとゆっくり話したほうがよいかな」
languages.original_text: "I have spoken plainly enough for you to understand the essence of my question. Perhaps I should speak more slowly."

traits.locale_text: 「私の問いの本質を理解できるよう、十分に分かりやすく語ったつもりだ。もっとゆっくり話したほうがよいかな」
